raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 Farmworker Relief Package is the first-in-the-nation initiative targeting farmworker protections during the pandemic.",
    "The relief package aims to expand access to testing and personal protective equipment (PPE) for farmworkers.",
    "The new housing program, 'Housing for the Harvest,' allows sick or at-risk agricultural workers to isolate and quarantine safely.",
    "There will be increased enforcement of workplace health and safety protocols for agricultural worksites.",
    "A new education and outreach program will educate farmworkers on ways to reduce their risk for COVID-19."
  ]
}
```
